row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a curved road to the right.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate construction barriers on the right and potential vehicles or obstacles ahead; blue lines suggest lane boundaries.

semantic.scene_summary: A real-world driving scene showing a paved road curving slightly to the right. The environment includes trees, grassy embankments, buildings in the distance, and orange/white construction barriers lining the right side of the road.
semantic.visibility_notes: Clear visibility with natural lighting. Objects are distinct and spatially consistent.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression. No sudden jumps or discontinuities in object positions. The camera moves steadily along the road.
logical.object_continuity: Barriers and roadside elements remain continuous and coherent throughout the frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and surrounding structures maintain consistent perspective and alignment.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the curved path.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards visible. Construction barriers are static and do not impede the current lane.

semantic.scene_summary: An AI-generated version of the same scene. It depicts a similar road curving right with trees, barriers, and distant buildings. However, textures appear smoother and less detailed compared to the reference.
semantic.visibility_notes: Some blurring and loss of fine texture detail. Barriers appear slightly distorted or merged in places.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears generally smooth but exhibits slight warping or flickering in barrier edges. Temporal consistency is mostly maintained but with minor artifacts.
logical.object_continuity: Objects persist across frames but show some instability in shape and position, particularly near the barriers.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall road structure is preserved, but local distortions occur around the barrier zone.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle continues forward steadily, mimicking the reference trajectory.
decision.risk_context: No clear emergency maneuver required. Scene readability is slightly reduced due to generation artifacts, which may affect downstream interpretation.

missing_or_weakened_elements: Fine texture details on road surface and barriers
